tweets.text: If you want to contribute- it would be great if you could help create more detailed per-state pages for the state you live in. Organizations, background, legislation, news stories, etc. https://t.co/qO2ybWJhYy

Part of the way that I feel personally able to contribute is by providing the venue or the platform- I have the know-how and the servers that others might not have- and https://t.co/NMWfrOfXfo was available. But I love how it can grow even when I am exhausted. It keeps me going.

The really nice thing about wiki software is the low barrier to entry. I really think with huge seemingly insurmountable problems, providing a platform for people who don't necessarily know the best way to contribute to chisel at small pieces together is powerful.

It's been really incredible to watch the Tracking ICE Wiki grow as people add new bits of information and datasets. Someone even started building state-by-state pages. This reminds me why I love the internet. https://t.co/ZIoiDgnZl3 https://t.co/VvolBzAw5J
